title: micromeria microphylla
intro: Micromeria microphylla, also known as mountain savory or Crete savory, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in Greek and Mediterranean cultures, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Micromeria microphylla can be prepared in various forms, such as tea, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a range of herbal preparations.
